title: Diplodoc (theme.yaml)

base-brand.description: Primary brand color used for highlights, active states, and accents.
base-brand.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Primary brand color — used for highlights, active indicators, focus rings, and key accents throughout the UI.

base-selection.description: Background color for selected/active navigation items.
base-selection.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background color for the selected / active state of navigation items and interactive elements.

base-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Main page background color (applied to `<body>`).

text-primary.description: Primary text color for body text and headings.
text-primary.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Primary text color — used for body text, headings, and most readable content.

text-secondary.description: Secondary/muted text color for captions, labels, and helper text.
text-secondary.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Secondary (muted) text color — used for captions, labels, breadcrumbs, and other supporting text.

base-simple-hover.description: Hover background color for simple interactive elements (buttons, menu items).
base-simple-hover.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Hover background applied to simple interactive elements like menu items and icon buttons.

line-generic.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Default color for borders, dividers, and horizontal rules (`<hr>`).

note-info-background.description: Background color for informational note/callout blocks.
note-info-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background of `{% note info %}` callout blocks.

note-tip-background.description: Background color for tip/hint note blocks.
note-tip-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background of `{% note tip %}` callout blocks.

note-warning-background.description: Background color for warning note blocks.
note-warning-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background of `{% note warning %}` callout blocks.

note-important-background.description: Background color for important/critical note blocks.
note-important-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background of `{% note important %}` / `{% note alert %}` callout blocks.

quote.description: Text or border color for blockquote elements.
quote.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Color applied to blockquote `>` elements — typically the left border accent.

tab-active.description: Active tab indicator color (underline or background).
tab-active.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Color of the active tab indicator (usually the bottom border or background of the selected tab).

tab-text.description: Default text color of tab labels.
tab-text.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Default text color of tab labels in `{% list tabs %}` blocks.

tab-text-hover.description: Text color of tab labels on hover.
tab-text-hover.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Text color of tab labels when hovered.

link-hover.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Color for hyperlinks on hover/focus.

term-dfn-background.description: Background color for term definition tooltip popups.
term-dfn-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background of the tooltip popup shown when hovering over a defined term (`[*term]: definition`).

code.description: Text color inside fenced code blocks.
code.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Text color inside fenced code blocks (` ``` ` blocks).

code-background.description: Background color of fenced code blocks.
code-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background color of fenced code blocks.

inline-code.description: Text color of inline code spans.
inline-code.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Text color of inline code spans (`` `code` ``).

inline-code-background.description: Background color of inline code spans.
inline-code-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background color of inline code spans (`` `code` ``).

table.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Default text color inside table cells.

table-row-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background color for alternating (even) rows in tables.

table-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Default background for table cells and the table header row.

table-border.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Color of table border lines and cell dividers.

mini-toc-border.description: Border/accent line color of the mini table-of-contents sidebar.
mini-toc-border.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Left border color of the mini TOC (on-page heading navigator) sidebar.

mini-toc.description: Default text color of mini TOC heading links.
mini-toc.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Default text color of links in the mini TOC sidebar.

mini-toc-hover.description: Text color of mini TOC links on hover.
mini-toc-hover.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Text color of mini TOC links on hover.

mini-toc-active.description: Text color of the currently active mini TOC heading link.
mini-toc-active.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Text color of the currently-visible (active) heading link in the mini TOC.

mini-toc-active-border.description: Accent border color for the active mini TOC heading link.
mini-toc-active-border.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Left border/indicator color for the active heading in the mini TOC sidebar.

light.description: Color overrides applied only in light theme.
light.markdownDescription: **`ColorProperties`** Color overrides applied **only in light theme**. Uses the same properties as the root level.

dark.description: Color overrides applied only in dark theme.
dark.markdownDescription: **`ColorProperties`** Color overrides applied **only in dark theme**. Uses the same properties as the root level.

base-brand.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Primary brand color for this theme variant.

base-simple-hover.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Hover background for simple interactive elements.

line-generic.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Default border and divider color.

note-info-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background of info callout blocks.

note-tip-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background of tip callout blocks.

note-warning-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background of warning callout blocks.

note-important-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Background of important callout blocks.

tab-text-hover.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Tab label text on hover.

code.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Fenced code block text color.

inline-code.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Inline code span text color.

table-row-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Alternating table row background (zebra striping).

table-background.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Table header and default cell background.

table-border.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Table border and cell divider color.

mini-toc-border.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Mini TOC left border accent.

mini-toc-hover.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Mini TOC link text on hover.

mini-toc-active.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Active heading link in the mini TOC.

mini-toc-active-border.description: Active mini TOC link border color.
mini-toc-active-border.markdownDescription: **`string (CSS color)`** Active heading indicator border in the mini TOC.

ColorProperties.markdownDescription: **`ColorProperties`** Color property overrides for a specific theme variant (light or dark). All values are CSS color expressions.

markdownDescription:
Diplodoc theme configuration file.
Override brand colors and UI element colors for the documentation viewer. All values are CSS color expressions (hex, `rgb()`, `var(--...)`, etc.).
Top-level properties set **both** light and dark themes simultaneously. Use `light:` and `dark:` sections to set theme-specific values.
```yaml base-brand: '#005BFF' light:
  base-background: '#FFFFFF'
dark:
  base-background: '#22262E'
```
